rulings.Case Title: WALDO M JOHNSON JR VS. CHESTERFIELD MORTGAGE INVESTORS, INC., A et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 16, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT 7017-DW&J,LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny motion for summary judgment triable issue of material fact. Plantiff's knowledge of misrepresentation perpetrated by Wilson see Johnson declaration paragraph 8 and 9; Separate statement 11, 12, 13 et al. Deny motion for summary adjudication failed to comply CRC 3.1350(b) =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YOLANDA MIANI, ET AL VS. LABIB MAJID BARANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 16, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT LONE OAK FUND, LLC, A CORPORATION, ABBASI, A.S. TRUSTEE, CARDIOVASCULAR ASSOCIATES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny motion for summary judgment re 1st deed of trust of Lone Oak Fund and 2nd deed of trust of Abbasi A.S.. Triable issue material fact whether reconveyance and deed of trust are void see defendants evidence exhibit I and plaintiff's declaration paragraph 18 exhibit 5. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YOLANDA MIANI, ET AL VS. LABIB MAJID BARANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 16, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT COMMONWEALTH LAND TITLE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny motion for summary judgment, triable issue of materal fact re waiver see paragraph 39 of separate statement plaintiff's declaration paragraph 18. Overrule objection. Deny motion for summary adjudication failure to comply CRC 3.1350(b) as to all moving party. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 691 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC VS. LYNN KIM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Responses To First Set Of Form Interoggs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 16, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF 691 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses To First Set Of Form Interoggs. Off calendar per moving party. =(501/REQ)
